title: Project:Article guidance/Bridge
label: Bridge
description: Structure that spans and provides a passage over a road, railway, river, or some other obstacle

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Actor
label: Actor
description: Person who acts in a dramatic or comic production and works in film, television, theatre, or radio

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Album
label: Album
description: Grouping of album releases by an artist usually released at the same time with the same title and tracks but in different formats for consumption (digital, CD, LP)

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Animal
label: Animalia
description: Kingdom of multicellular eukaryotic organisms

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Armed Conflict
label: Conflict
description: Friction, disagreement, or discord within a group or between different groups

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Astronomical Object
label: Astronomical object
description: Physical body of astronomically-significant size, mass, or role, naturally occurring in a universe

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Award
label: Award
description: Something given to a person or a group of people to recognize their merit or excellence

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Book
label: Book
description: Medium for recording information (words or images) typically on bound pages or more abstractly in electronic or audio form

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Building
label: Building
description: Structure, typically enclosed with a roof and walls, standing more or less permanently in one place

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Celebrity
label: Celebrity
description: Prominent person who commands some degree of public fascination and appears in the media

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Chemical Element
label: Chemical element
description: Species of atoms having the same number of protons in the atomic nucleus and the same chemical properties, but not necessarily the same mass, or the same stability (or half-lifetime if they are unstable)

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Citrus
label: Fruit
description: Typically sweet and/or sour, edible part/s of a plant that resembles seed-bearing fruit

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/City
label: City
description: Large human settlement

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Company
label: Business
description: Organization undertaking commercial, industrial, or professional activity

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Country
label: Country
description: Distinct territorial body or political entity

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Disease
label: Class of disease
description: Disease as a first-order metaclass. To be used as P31 values for all disease classes. Its instances are classes (e.g., cancer)

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Film
label: Film
description: Sequence of images that give the impression of movement, stored on film stock

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Fossil
label: Fossil taxon
description: Taxon described on the basis of fossil material

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Fruit
label: Fruit
description: Typically sweet and/or sour, edible part/s of a plant that resembles seed-bearing fruit

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Historical Country
label: Historical country
description: Country, state or territory that once existed

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Human Settlement
label: Human settlement
description: Place of any size, in which people permanently live

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Ice hockey player
label: Ice hockey player
description: Sportsperson taking part in ice hockey competitions

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Island
label: Island
description: Piece of sub-continental land completely surrounded by water

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Landform
label: Landform
description: Natural or anthropogenic land feature on the solid surface of the Earth or other planetary body; geomorphological unit in the Earth sciences

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Literary Work
label: Literary work
description: Written work read for enjoyment or edification

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Medical Test
label: Medical test type
description: Wikidata metaclass for medical test and diagnostic procedure

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Museum
label: Museum
description: Institution that holds artifacts and other objects of scientific, artistic, cultural, historical, or other importance

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Music Genre
label: Music genre
description: Category that identifies pieces of music as belonging to a shared tradition or set of conventions

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Musician
label: Musician
description: Person who composes, conducts or performs music

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Person
label: Human
description: Any single member of Homo sapiens, unique extant species of the genus Homo

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Plant
label: Plant
description: Living thing in the kingdom of photosynthetic eukaryotes

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Politician
label: Politician
description: Person who holds or seeks positions in government

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Product
label: Machine
description: Set of moving and fixed elements that uses energy to perform an intended action

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Recent Event
label: Form of event
description: Metaclass, grouping forms and types of events by specificity

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Religion
label: Religion
description: Social-cultural system

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/School
label: Type of educational institution
description: Wikidata metaclass as a classification for educational institutions

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Social issue
label: Social issue
description: Problem that influences a considerable number of individuals within a society

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Software
label: Software
description: Non-tangible executable component of a computer

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Song
label: Musical work/composition
description: Wikidata metaclass; legal concept of uniquely identifiable piece or work of music, either vocal or instrumental; NOT applicable to recordings, broadcasts, or individual publications of music in printed or digital form or on physical media

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Sports Club
label: Sports club
description: Organization for the purpose of playing one or more sports

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Sportsperson
label: Athlete
description: Person who participates regularly in a running competition sports

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Television Series
label: Television series
description: Connected set of television program episodes under the same title

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Theorem
label: Theorem
description: In mathematics, a statement that has been proved

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Tropical fruit
label: Fruit
description: Typically sweet and/or sour, edible part/s of a plant that resembles seed-bearing fruit

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/University
label: University
description: Academic institution for further education

title: Project:ArticleGuidance/Video Game
label: Video game
description: Electronic game with user interface and visual feedback

title: مشروع: إرشادات المقالات/شخص
label: Human
description: Any single member of Homo sapiens, unique extant species of the genus Homo
